explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **mid-sentence continuations in formal, journalistic, or descriptive prose** (such as news report clauses, descriptive phrases following an introductory element, or explanatory text continuing a prior thought).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (Italian, German, Turkish, Bulgarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Spanish, English, etc.) and primarily in contexts of news reporting, official statements, descriptive articles, and procedural or institutional explanations. The texts are typically fragments that follow a colon, comma, or opening quotation mark, continuing a narrative or argument.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: High-activation texts are almost exclusively **clausal continuations or dependent phrases** that grammatically and semantically extend a preceding idea (e.g., after a colon, a quoted speech introduction, or a subordinate clause). Low-activation examples are often **headline-style phrases, standalone sentences, or text beginnings** (e.g., "Bruxelles va présenter...", "TVS XL100 on road price...", "New Delhi: On the 2020...") that start a new thought or are syntactically complete.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects text that is syntactically and semantically dependent on prior context, acting as a continuation marker for formal expository or journalistic discourse. It essentially fires on prose that is "in the flow" of reporting or explanation, rather than on self-contained statements or titles.

results.actual_text: znej im. Armii Ludowo Wyzwoleńczej w Pekinie, sieć ta ma składać się z 12
results.plain_text:
Starlink jest dla Chin jak cierń w oku. 

 Chiny jak dotychczas wielokrotnie wyrażały swoje niezadowolenie z istnienia sieci Starlink. Widzą ją one jako zagrożenie. Dlatego nie tak dawno chińscy wojskowi naukowcy zaczęli wzywać swoją nację do opracowania w razie potrzeby planu całkowitego zniszczenia konstelacji satelitów należącej do SpaceX. Teraz okazuje się także, że Chiny zamierzają stworzyć własną kosmiczną sieć internetowych satelitów. Miałby być ona rzecz jasna jeszcze bardziej rozbudowana niż Starlink i być wykorzystywana do realizacji misji wymierzonych w amerykańską sieć. Ambitne plany  O rzekomych chińskich planach donosi South China Morning Post. Sieć satelitarna kraju środka ma nosić kryptonim GW. Według zespołu, któremu przewodzi Xu Can z Uniwersytetu Inżynierii Kosmicznej im. Armii Ludowo Wyzwoleńczej w Pekinie, sieć ta ma składać się z 12 992 satelitów. Ich właścicielem ma być nowo utworzona China Satellite Network Group Co. Wszystkie te szczegóły ujawniono w artykule opublikowanym przez Xu i jego zespół w chińskim czasopiśmie Command Control and Simulation – poświęconemu środkom, które mają być odpowiedzią na Starlink. Nie wiadomo, kiedy pierwsze chińskie satelity miałyby trafić na orbitę. Podobno ma to nastąpić najprawdopodobniej zanim budowa sieci Starlink zostanie ukończona, tak aby istniała pewność, że Chiny będą miały swoje miejsce na niskiej orbicie okołoziemskiej. Dla przypomnienia, SpaceX planuje wystrzelić 12 tysięcy satelitów Starlink do 2027 roku, ale ostatecznie pragnie, by sieć ta składała się z 40 tysięcy satelitów. Naukowcy z Chin twierdzą, że ich satelity mogłyby zostać umieszczone na orbitach, których Starlink jeszcze nie osiągnął. W ten sposób Chiny „zyskałyby dodatkowe możliwości i korzyści na innych wysokościach orbitalnych, a nawet mogłyby stłumić Starlink”. Wyrażono nawet zainteresowanie wyposażeniem chińskich satelitów w pociski, które w razie potrzeby mogłyby być wykorzystywane do niszczenia satelitów Starlink. Starlink = zagrożenie?  Dlaczego Chiny tak bardzo obawiają się sieci Starlink i chcą przygotować odpowiedź na nią? W skrócie uważają, że satelity tworzące sieć Starlink wkrótce zyskają panowanie nad niską orbitą okołoziemską i pomocą amerykańskiej armii w zdominowaniu tego cennego obszaru kosmosu. Chinom nie spodobało się rzecz jasna to, jaką rolę sieć Starlink odegrała w Ukrainie. Oczywiście Chiny chciałby posiadać własną sieć internetowych satelitów także dlatego, że mogłaby ona zaoferować jej żołnierzom łączność w terenie. Warto w tym miejscu przypomnieć, że chociaż Chiny boją się o to, że sieć Starlink zostanie uzbrojona, SpaceX niedawno ograniczyło Ukrainie możliwość wykorzystywania tej sieci do ofensywnych celów wojskowych. Dokonano tego po doniesieniach o tym, że ukraińskie wojsko używało satelitarnego internetu do kontrolowania dronów. SpaceX stwierdziło, że usługa może być wykorzystywana do komunikacji wojskowej, ale nigdy nie była przeznaczona do celów ofensywnych. Źródło: SCMP, fot. tyt. Canva

results.actual_text: sindaco Domenico Venuti aveva attivato il Centro Operativo Comunale per le emergenze. Anche il presidente della Regione, N
results.plain_text: Ancora una scossa di terremoto nel Belice. I sismografi dell’Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia hanno registrato alle 22.50 un terremoto di magnitudo 3.1, con epicentro localizzato 2 km a nord di Salemi. La scossa è stata percepita dalla popolazione, anche nelle zone limitrofe a Salemi. Si tratta del terzo episodio nel giro di pochi giorni, dopo quelli del 9 e del 14 settembre. Nello stesso periodo si è registrato anche un evento sismico con epicentro nel vicino centro di Vita e, in un’altra occasione, alcuni chilometri a nord della costa compresa tra Alcamo e Castellammare.  La scorsa settimana il sindaco Domenico Venuti aveva attivato il Centro Operativo Comunale per le emergenze. Anche il presidente della Regione, Nello Musumeci, dopo aver parlato con il dirigente della Protezione Civile Regionale Salvo Cocina, ha disposto l’invio di tecnici specializzati dell’amministrazione regionale nella Valle del Belice per verificare lo stato di aggiornamento dei Piani comunali di Protezione civile, l’organizzazione del volontariato e le verifiche di agibilità degli edifici pubblici strategici.

results.plain_text:
Pentru 01.11.2017 Toate valutele 
							    Preşedintele Igor Dodon susţine că România nu are resursele financiare pentru a-şi putea asuma o eventuală Unire cu Republica Moldova. 
							 Şeful statului a menţionat că subiectul respectiv este actualizat în contextul campaniei electorale, în realitate, potrivit lui, România nu are avea bani pentru Unire. Totodată, Dodon a precizat că nici cetăţenii din Republica Moldova nu-şi doresc acest lucru.    „Conform sondajelor, contra Unirii pledează 80% dintre cetăţenii noştri. În plus, avem problema Transnistriei şi a Găgăuziei, care în cazul dat are drept de autodeterminare”, a subliniat şeful statului.  Preşedintele a adăugat că niciodată nu a avut întrevederi cu conducerea de vârf a SUA, însă în timpul discuţiilor cu reprezentanţii americani a observat că „mulţi dintre ei se uită la noi cu ochii României, unde nu se ascund planurile de a anexa ţara noastră”.  Igor Dodon a precizat încă o dată că nu are nimic contra României, „unde locuiesc prietenii şi fraţii noştri”.  „Însă eu sunt împotriva lichidării statalităţii moldoveneşti. Imaginaţi-vă că eu mă voi duce în ţara vecină, voi forma un partid care va pleda pentru ruperea părţii de Est a teritoriului, unde locuiesc moldoveni şi care a aparţinut Moldovei din Evul Mediu. Eu voi fi imediat arestat pentru că legile româneşti interzic asta, iar la noi e posibil, deocamdată posibil”, a notat Dodon.      


 În aceste zile acum o sută de ani, orașul Chișinău era gazda unui important eveniment istoric, care avea să schimbe definitiv soarta Basarabiei și implicit a R. Moldova. () Citeşte tot articolul Încă din cele mai vechi timpuri breslele de negustori se băteau pe monopol. () Citeşte tot articolul În 2014, în cadrul lansării cărții „Groapa cu lei”, Constantin Tănase spunea că acest volum încheie un ciclu din viața sa și din viața social-politică a R. Moldova. () Citeşte tot articolul Mai mulți chișinăuieni, care hotărâseră să boicoteze referendumul socialist anti-Chirtoacă, au rămas puțin derutați după ce Partidul Liberal a decis să se înregistreze în calitate de participant la acest plebiscit. () Citeşte tot articolul Bună ziua, mă numesc Stanislav Florea, sunt medic terapeut la Internatul Psihoneurologic din Bălți, soț și tată iubitor, creștin. Vreau să vă spun că eu am o problemă. () Citeşte tot articolul Dacă nu mă înşel, expresia „teoreticieni de berărie” îi aparţine lui Caragiale. Nea Iancu îi numea astfel pe amatorii de a face politică mare la o halbă de bere. () Citeşte tot articolul Am scris de multe ori că riscăm să Îl percepem foarte eronat pe Iisus Hristos. () Citeşte tot articolul

results.actual_text: A long-running trade dispute between the U.S. and China has rattled financial markets
results.plain_text: A long-running trade dispute between the U.S. and China has rattled financial markets in recent months. Despite a recent trade truce, external observers remain deeply skeptical about the chances of Washington and Beijing agreeing to a comprehensive trade pact. “If you look at Apple, it is American technology, the product is produced in Chinese factories by a Taiwanese company (and) so it is right at the forefront of vulnerability to trade conflict,” Bob Parker, investment committee member at Quilvest Wealth Management, told CNBC on Friday. A trade war between the world’s two largest economies is likely to evolve into a dispute over intellectual property rights over the coming months, one analyst told CNBC Friday, with Apple set to bear the brunt of any further fallout.  A long-running trade dispute between the U.S. and China has rattled financial markets in recent months, with a global stock market sell-off gathering pace in December amid escalating concerns of a possible economic slowdown.  “There is a high probability that the debate about trade tariffs probably will calm down, but the debate about intellectual property rights (and) cybersecurity, probably will escalate,” Bob Parker, investment committee member at Quilvest Wealth Management, told CNBC’s “Squawk Box Europe” on Friday.  “I think that’s going to be the big issue for the first half of next year,” Parker said.  A global stock market sell-off in recent weeks has put Wall Street firmly on track for its biggest December loss since the Great Depression. It comes amid worries about a darkening economic outlook, with U.S. tech giants all falling into bear market territory of late.  Amazon, Netflix, Alphabet and Apple all led the gains for the tech-heavy Nasdaq during the bull market. However, the benchmark is down by around 20 percent from a record reached at the end of August.  Apple is down 32 percent from its latest high, while Amazon is off by 29 percent from its record. At their peaks, both were worth more than $1 trillion in market value.  Complicating matters for Apple at present, the tech behemoth lost a second court skirmish in its worldwide patent battle with chip supplier Qualcomm on Thursday. The ruling comes weeks after Qualcomm secured a court order to ban sales of some iPhone models in China. Apple is contesting both rulings.  Nonetheless, the case has fueled investor concerns of Apple’s exposure to a deepening rift between the U.S. and China.  “In the work we’ve done, Apple is actually the most sensitive company to conflict between the U.S. and China on trade,” Parker said.  “If you look at Apple, it is American technology, the product is produced in Chinese factories by a Taiwanese company (and) so it is right at the forefront of vulnerability to trade conflict.”  Meanwhile, China’s Foreign Ministry said Friday that it firmly opposes “slanderous” allegations from the U.S. and other Western allies criticizing Beijing for economic espionage.  U.S. prosecutors indicted two Chinese nationals on charges of stealing confidential data from U.S. government agencies as well as other global corporations.  Britain, Australia and New Zealand had all joined the U.S. in condemning China over what they described as a global campaign of cyber-enabled commercial intellectual property theft.  When asked whether investors should be worried about the prospect of China adopting a more combative stance toward the U.S. during trade talks, with Beijing potentially even targeting specific U.S. tech giants, Parker replied: “Absolutely … Regrettably, it is the American tech sector which is the most vulnerable.”

predictions.text: Despite a recent trade truce, external observers remain deeply skeptical about the chances of Washington and Beijing agreeing to a comprehensive trade pact. “If you look at Apple, it is American technology, the product is produced in Chinese factories by a Taiwanese company (and) so it is right at the forefront of vulnerability to trade conflict,” Bob Parker, investment committee member at Quilvest Wealth Management, told CNBC on Friday.
predictions.reasoning: This section includes a formal quoted speech that continues the narrative after an introductory clause.
